figures.caption: Table 7: Optimal fixed exposure weights αfixed under different bound configurations. Results are reported for αIF = (0, 0, 0) (IF00) and αIF = (1, 1, 0) (IF11). Bounds are reported per (t,LoB) and are common to IF00 and IF11. Values are reported with two decimals.

Table 8: Training-set performance for Inforce configuration αIF = (0, 0, 0) under different constraint sets. Reported are the mean and standard deviation of the reward, the empirical DCVaR0.99, and the VaR0.99 of the loss.

Table 9: Training-set performance for Inforce configuration αIF = (1, 1, 0) under different constraint sets. Reported are the mean and standard deviation of the reward, the empirical DCVaR0.99, and the VaR0.99 of the loss.
Figure 2: Computational pipeline for the shared policy optimization in (4.2).

Figure 3: Illustration of the optimization-induced shift of the loss distribution. The displacement of VaR0.99(−R) is a direct consequence of the leftward translation of −R under the optimal allocation.
Table 1: Numerical results for different horizons N ∈ {4, 12, 52} and for the three constraint types (LO: Long-Only, RC: Relative Constraint, NC: No Constraint).

Table 2: Out-of-sample performance (evaluation set) under both in-force configurations. Reported are the mean and standard deviation of the reward, the empirical DCVaR0.99, and the VaR0.99 of the loss.
